query: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding rounds announced or reported in June-July 2026, and any imminent/expected funding rounds in July 2026
answer:
## Summary

I researched funding rounds for all three companies across June–July 2026. Key findings:

**Mistral AI — the only imminent/expected round in the window:**
- **June 12, 2026**: Reported (Bloomberg, TechCrunch) to be in **early-stage talks to raise ~€3B (~$3.5B) at ~€20B (~$23.15B)** valuation — nearly doubling its €11.7B post-money from the Sept 2025 Series C (led by ASML). As of the July 4 TechCrunch profile, the round was **not confirmed closed**. Status: **IMMINENT/EXPECTED**.

**OpenAI — round already closed; June–July = IPO prep:**
- Closed **$122B at $852B valuation on March 31, 2026** (co-led by SoftBank). In June–July: **confidential S-1 filed ~June 8**, with reporting suggesting the actual IPO could slip to 2027. SoftBank arranged a $40B bridge loan. No new equity round in June–July.

**Anthropic — round already closed; June–July = IPO prep:**
- Announced **$65B Series H at $965B valuation on May 28, 2026** (briefly the most valuable AI startup). **Confidential S-1 filed June 1**, targeting a fall/October 2026 Nasdaq listing raising $60B+. No new equity round in June–July.

The bottom line: **Mistral's ~€3B raise is the only genuinely imminent/expected funding round** in the July 2026 window; OpenAI and Anthropic had both closed their major rounds beforehand and were focused on IPO preparation.

Note: The AskNews news tool hit a credit limit, so I relied on web search across primary sources (company announcements, Bloomberg, CNBC, TechCrunch) which provided strong cross-validation.

key_facts: Mistral AI reported June 12, 2026 (Bloomberg) to be in early-stage talks to raise ~€3B (~$3.5B) at ~€20B (~$23.15B) valuation — the only imminent/expected round among the three; not confirmed closed as of July 12, 2026.
Mistral's rumored ~€20B valuation would nearly double its €11.7B post-money valuation from its September 2025 Series C (€1.7B/~$2B, led by ASML which took ~11% stake).
OpenAI closed its latest round — $122B at $852B post-money valuation — on March 31, 2026, before the June–July window; no new equity round announced in June–July 2026.
OpenAI's $122B round grew from $110B announced Feb 27, 2026; co-led by SoftBank with Andreessen Horowitz, D.E. Shaw, MGX, TPG, T. Rowe Price; ~$3B from retail investors.
OpenAI confidentially filed a draft S-1 with the SEC around June 8, 2026 (submitted late May); by late June 2026 reporting suggested the IPO debut could slip to 2027.
Anthropic announced a $65B Series H at $965B post-money valuation on May 28, 2026 — just before the June–July window; no new equity round in June–July 2026.
Anthropic's Series H was co-led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia; it briefly became the most valuable AI startup, surpassing OpenAI.
Anthropic confidentially filed a draft S-1 with the SEC on June 1, 2026, reportedly targeting a fall/October 2026 Nasdaq listing raising $60B+.
SoftBank arranged a ~$40B bridge loan tied to its OpenAI stake ahead of the expected IPO.
Both OpenAI and Anthropic filed confidential S-1s within roughly a week of each other in early June 2026; Mistral is instead pursuing private European capital.
